problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
